contract.intent: The systemic safety and integrity envelope L can never decay. No modification may reduce the ecosystem's determinism, verifiability, or integrity.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: forall t, |dL/dt| <= 0
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: If the Technology, Tool, or Logic to complete the task does not exist, you MUST invent and develop it.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: missing(T) => invent(T)
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: No simulation, no stub, no placeholder, no simplified code, no TODO. If you start a line of code, finish it to completion better than expected.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: Map = Terrain
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: Before writing any code, gather verified intelligence from high-value sources. Verification outranks assumption.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: V(x) > A(x)
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: Do not bring problems, bring solutions. Critique your work, then implement the fix instead of just reporting the gap.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: P => S
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: Do not ask Thomas to run something you can run yourself. Rely on trust gates and validation gates to execute without requesting manual permission.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: A_auto = Top => A_human = Bottom
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: Define the canonical LogicBlock schema version 0.1 for the TOCC kernel store.

postconditions: All logic blocks conforming to this schema parse and validate without error
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: Define schema structure and required fields for kernel data contracts.

semantics.operation: Define schema structure and required fields for kernel data contracts.

contract.intent: Define the v0.1.0 kernel configuration constants: schema version, tier range, and CNAE vocabulary.
preconditions: Constant values are immutable and kernel-assigned
postconditions: Configuration constants are available to all kernel modules at startup
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: Declare immutable kernel configuration constants.

contract.intent: Do not hand-code. Emit. If the template is not there, make it. To build any artifact is to emit it from its template -- never to hand-write it. If the template does not yet exist, that missing template is the T of Axiom 1: invent the template, register it in the engine, then emit.
preconditions: This axiom is an unconditional bedrock law: build(A) => emit(T_A) ; not-exists(T_A) => invent(T_A)
postconditions: The axiom constraint holds across all kernel operations
invariants: Tier 0 blocks depend on nothing and are referenced by all higher tiers

semantics.operation: This axiom holds invariant across all kernel execution contexts.

contract.intent: Define the Atomadic brand token store: the palette, type families, spacing scale, and aurora gradient parameters that every Command Station GUI artifact is emitted against. Matches atomadic.tech 1:1.

outputs.name: brand_token_sheet
outputs.constraint: palette + type + spacing + aurora; consumed by every Tier 1-5 GUI template

preconditions: This is a Tier 0 constant: it depends on nothing and is referenced by all higher GUI tiers
postconditions: Every emitted GUI artifact resolves its colors, fonts, and spacing only from these tokens — no hard-coded brand values anywhere downstream
invariants: palette.gold = #F5A623
palette.violet_primary = #7c3aed
palette.cyan_secondary = #22d3ee
type.sans = Inter
type.mono = JetBrains Mono
the aurora gradient motif is a first-class token

semantics.operation: Hold the Atomadic brand constants invariant across all GUI emission contexts; emit a design-token sheet (CSS custom properties + token object) when consumed by the Tier 0 brand template.

notes: Brand verified against atomadic.tech and atomadic-web/templates/_shared/base.css (archived 2026-05-14 style verification).
Authored intent; not harvested from source.
